title: Optimizium
description: A optimization modpack that adds vanilla friendly mods without frying your PC!
body:
# A minecraft modpack that adds all the cool things without frying your PC!

## -What is optimizium? ------

Optimizium (op-tuh-miz-euhm) is a optimization modpack that adds to the vanilla feel of minecraft. No absurd additions or crazy shaders, just vanilla.

## -Is optimizium shader friendly? ------

Yes, the mods that are in the pack are carefully picked to be compatible with any shaders or resource packs.

### -Why should I use optimizium? ------

Optimizium is a vanilla optimization pack that is mod friendly for the best minecraft modded experince.

V 1.0.0:
- Release
